text.title: Mobile UX Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the mobile-ux methodology end-to-end.

step.name: screen-inventory
step.action: Enumerate screens with route + name + primary action.

step.name: measure-vitals
step.action: Run scripts/mobile-audit.sh; extract LCP / FID / CLS / TTI.
step.decision-gate: If any vital fails threshold, add a category=vitals finding.

step.name: measure-touch-targets
step.action: For each interactive element measure tap-target size and adjacent spacing.

step.name: thumb-zone-and-nav
step.action: Verify primary actions in bottom-third zone; verify nav is bottom-tab (3-5); flag hamburger-as-primary.

step.name: input-types-and-platform
step.action: Verify input type per field; verify platform gestures have button alternatives.

step.name: validate-and-flag-review
step.action: Run scripts/validate-mobile-ux.py; surface "ready for owner review" flag.
